Class HomeLocation

java.lang.Object
sims.world.Loc
sims.world.HomeLocation
All Implemented Interfaces:
Location
public class HomeLocation extends Loc implements Location
Represents a specific sub-location within a Home, such as a room or area. A HomeLocation extends Loc and can contain upgrades, while maintaining a reference to its parent Home.

This class manages upgrades, provides access to Sims present in the parent home, and defines how Sims move into this sub-location.

    Returns the list of Sims currently present in the parent home.

    Moves a Sim into this home location.

    Removes a Sim from the parent home and prints the list of Sims before and after removal for debugging purposes.

    Sets the parent home of this location.

  • Constructor Details

    • HomeLocation

      public HomeLocation(String locName, Home home)
      Constructs a new HomeLocation with the specified name and parent home.
      Parameters:
      locName - the name of the home location
      home - the parent Home this location belongs to

  • Method Details

    • addUpgrade

      public void addUpgrade(HomeUpgrade upgrade)
      Adds an upgrade to this home location.
      Parameters:
      upgrade - the HomeUpgrade to add

    • getUpgradeList

      public List<HomeUpgrade> getUpgradeList()
      Returns the list of upgrades applied to this home location.
      Returns:
      a list of HomeUpgrade objects

    • getHome

      public Home getHome()
      Returns the parent home of this location.
      Returns:
      the parent Home

    • getLocSimList

      public List<Sim> getLocSimList()
      Returns the list of Sims currently present in the parent home. This overrides the base implementation to delegate to the home.
      Specified by:
      getLocSimList in interface Location
      Overrides:
      getLocSimList in class Loc
      Returns:
      a list of Sims in the parent home

    • removeSim

      public void removeSim(Sim sim)
      Removes a Sim from the parent home and prints the list of Sims before and after removal for debugging purposes.
      Specified by:
      removeSim in interface Location
      Overrides:
      removeSim in class Loc
      Parameters:
      sim - the Sim to remove

    • moveTo

      public void moveTo(Sim sim)
      Moves a Sim into this home location. The Sim's current location is updated, and the Sim is added to the parent home if not already present.
      Specified by:
      moveTo in interface Location
      Specified by:
      moveTo in class Loc
      Parameters:
      sim - the Sim to move into this location

    • setHome

      public void setHome(Home home)
      Sets the parent home of this location.
      Parameters:
      home - the new parent Home
